action.reasoning:
Observation: Best rmse_z500=444.64 from iter 18 (ensemble of model1+model2 with TTA). I have 1.7h remaining and 11 iterations. Training a 3rd model took ~30-35 min in iter 17. I can fit 2-3 more training runs.

Analysis: The ensemble of 2 models gave a big jump (462→444). Adding a 3rd model with different seed should further reduce variance. I'll train model3 with seed=456 and slightly different hyperparameters (LR=1.5e-4, dropout=0.12) to maximize diversity. Then update predict.py to ensemble all 3 models.

Decision: Train model3 with seed=456, then submit eval with 3-model ensemble.
action.command: SEED=456 LR=1.5e-4 WEIGHT_DECAY=2e-4 DROPOUT=0.12 SAVE_NAME=model3 python train_ensemble.py
